title: Scaffold Moto One Hyper custom ROM lab

preflight.note: Stamped by `repopact new`; the work item was recorded before implementation began.

acceptance_criteria.text: ROM lab directory structure and required planning documents exist under rom_lab/.
Device profile records Motorola One Hyper def facts without claiming verified stock boot or root.
Source matrix, emulator/GSI plan, Lineage/AOSP build plan, and feasibility report are recorded.
Validation and tests enforce ROM lab presence, safety invariants, and no committed firmware/image artifacts.
No destructive or firmware-write action is performed on the physical phone.
